description: Comparative veterinary medicine — canine/feline PK, IL-31, JAK inhibitors, allometry

exp100_canine_il31.paper: Gonzales AJ et al. (2014) IL-31-induced pruritus in dogs: a novel experimental model to evaluate anti-pruritic effects of canine therapeutics

exp101_canine_jak1.paper: Gonzales AJ et al. (2014) Oclacitinib (Apoquel) is a novel Janus kinase inhibitor with activity against cytokines involved in allergy

exp102_il31_pruritus_timecourse.paper: Gonzales AJ et al. (2014) — same study as exp100, time-course extension

exp103_lokivetmab_duration.paper: Michels GM et al. (2016) A blinded, randomized, placebo-controlled trial of the efficacy of lokivetmab

exp104_cross_species_pk.paper: Mahmood I, Balian JD (1996) Interspecies scaling: predicting clearance of drugs in humans

exp105_canine_gut_anderson.paper: Anderson PW (1958) — applied to canine gut microbiome diversity
exp105_canine_gut_anderson.note: Illustrative canine abundance vectors — not from specific canine 16S study

exp106_feline_hyperthyroid.paper: Trepanier LA (2006) Pharmacokinetics of antithyroid drugs in cats
